_comment: Gen 1 OU Tauros — opponent fixture. Normal type, no status, charging a two-turn move (preparing=true).
_note_boosts: In Gen 1 Special is one stat (spc), so spa and spd boosts are always equal.
_note_stat_belief: Belief mean ≈ actual stats / STAT_NORM (512). Slightly higher std on atk/spe reflecting attack-range uncertainty.

stat_belief._note: mean[i] = estimated stat / 512. Slot 5 (spd) is 0 for gen 1.
